Name: FFunctionExpressionInput
Description: Struct that stores information about a function input which is needed to maintain connections and implement the function call.

Variables.Name: ExpressionInput
Variables.Description:
Reference to the FunctionInput in the material function.  
	  This is a reference to a private object so it can't be saved, and must be generated by UpdateFromFunctionResource or SetMaterialFunction.

Variables.Name: ExpressionInputId
Variables.Description: Id of the FunctionInput, used to link ExpressionInput.

Variables.Name: Input
Variables.Description: Actual input struct which stores information about how this input is connected in the material.
